'''鈭歾-l-g-th''' ('''kazalgethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quahaug|quahaug]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quahaug|quahaug]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-l-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazalgethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizalgethoko|thizalgethoko]] || [[word:jizalgethoko|jizalgethoko]] || [[word:shizalgethoko|shizalgethoko]] || [[word:kizalgethoko|kizalgethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozalgethoko|thozalgethoko]] || [[word:jozalgethoko|jozalgethoko]] || [[word:shozalgethoko|shozalgethoko]] || [[word:kozalgethoko|kozalgethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zalgethoko|th忙zalgethoko]] || [[word:j忙zalgethoko|j忙zalgethoko]] || [[word:sh忙zalgethoko|sh忙zalgethoko]] || [[word:k忙zalgethoko|k忙zalgethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazalgethoko|thazalgethoko]] || [[word:jazalgethoko|jazalgethoko]] || [[word:shazalgethoko|shazalgethoko]] || [[word:kazalgethoko|kazalgethoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
